metadata.description: Probe Research client plugins (experiment tracking + read-only MCP + transcript capture).

plugins.name: probe-research
plugins.description: Experiment-tracking skills (probe-research:track-experiment, probe-research:manage-research-asset, probe-research:publish-experiment) wired to a read-only Probe Research MCP server; writes via the `probe` CLI.

plugins.name: probe-research-tap
plugins.description: Ships sanitized per-session Claude Code transcripts to your Research OS knowledgebase (server-side secret gate + quarantine).
